perf.regime: memory/launch-bound: collapses the argsort + 48-iter Python padding loop into ~5 launches (vLLM/SGLang-style 4-stage histogram + padded prefix-sum + scatter). ~14-34x over the reference across token counts.

notes: Portable Triton; bit-for-bit identical to the reference. The truncate=false (fixed-shape) path is for HIP/CUDA-graph capture (issue #18).
